title: Provider Videos: Simple Trust Builder Most Practices Skip
metaDescription: Short provider videos build patient trust before the first visit. Learn how medical practices use intro videos on websites and ads to convert more leads.

bodyContent:
7 Conversion Killers on Healthcare Websites
Kevin
March 5, 2026 
No Comments
Healthcare websites often lose potential patients due to preventable design and usability mistakes. Learn the seven most common conversion killers and how to fix them.
Read more
